name: Grafana
notes: Observability dashboards; admin/admin. May prompt for password change — skip it.

tasks.description: Log in with username 'admin' and password 'admin'. If asked to change the password, click 'Skip'. Reach the home dashboard and stop.
Log in with email 'admin@admin.com' and password 'password'. Reach the home page and stop.
Log in with username 'admin' and password 'admin123'. Reach the dashboard and stop.
Log in with email 'admin@example.com' and password 'changeme!'. Reach the dashboard and stop.
Log in to PrestaShop admin with email 'demo@prestashop.com' and password 'prestashop_demo'. Reach the dashboard and stop.
This is the Metabase setup wizard. Pick the English language and proceed to the next step. Then stop.
This is NocoDB. Sign up with email 'admin@usersim.local' and password 'Password123!'. Click sign up and stop once you reach the dashboard.
This is the Ghost CMS setup. Begin creating an admin account: site title 'UserSim Test', email 'admin@usersim.local', name 'Admin', password 'Password123!'. Submit and stop.
Begin the Easy!Appointments setup. Accept default values for company info if presented. Proceed to the next step and stop.
Sign up to Twenty CRM with email 'admin@usersim.local' and password 'Password123!'. Submit and stop after reaching the workspace.
Sign up to Chatwoot with full name 'Admin', email 'admin@usersim.local', password 'Password123!'. Submit and stop.
Begin the Bagisto setup wizard. Accept default database options if shown. Proceed and stop.

name: Plausible
notes: Setup wizard; needs site + tracking script.
